path = 'Caregivers->Caregiver List'

    def click_menu(self, path: str):
        try:
            menu_items = path.split("->")
            main_menu = menu_items[0].strip()
            sub_menu = menu_items[1].strip()
    
            print(f"Clicking main menu: {main_menu}")
    
            # Click on the main menu
            main_menu_locator = self.page.locator(
                f"//tr[@class='MainMenurow']/td/table/tbody/tr/td[text()='{main_menu}']"
            )
            main_menu_locator.click()
    
            # Wait for submenu to appear
            self.page.wait_for_timeout(2000)  # Give time for submenu to load
    
            # Method 1: Get all submenu items directly (more reliable)
            print("Looking for submenu items...")
            submenu_locator = self.page.locator("//div[@class='FirstchildMenu']//td")
    
            # Wait for submenu to be visible
            submenu_locator.first.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
    
            # Get all submenu texts
            submenu_texts = submenu_locator.all_text_contents()
            print(f"Found submenu items: {submenu_texts}")
    
            # Find and click the matching submenu
            found = False
            for text in submenu_texts:
                if text.strip() == sub_menu:
                    print(f"Found exact match: {text}")
                    self.page.locator(f"//div[@class='FirstchildMenu']//td[text()='{text}']").click()
                    found = True
                    break
    
            # If exact match not found, try case-insensitive
            if not found:
                for text in submenu_texts:
                    if text.strip().lower() == sub_menu.lower():
                        print(f"Found case-insensitive match: {text}")
                        self.page.locator(f"//div[@class='FirstchildMenu']//td[text()='{text}']").click()
                        found = True
                        break
    
            if not found:
>               raise Exception(f"Sub menu '{sub_menu}' not found. Available: {submenu_texts}")
